normalized_title: City of Fremantle Local Planning Scheme No. 4 - Scheme Text
version_date: Gazetted 8 March 2007; consolidated text amended to 8 May 2026 (latest listed amendment: No. 86, gazetted 8 May 2026)
scope_summary: Operative local planning scheme text for the City of Fremantle under the Planning and Development Act 2005. It sets out reserves, zones and the zoning table, general development requirements (including adoption of the Residential Design Codes for residential development, vehicle parking Table 2, and commercial/industrial building requirements via Schedule 7), special control areas (including SCA 5.7 small infill development), heritage protection, development approval requirements and procedures, and schedules including the Schedule 1 dictionary and Schedule 12 local planning area height requirements.

key_numeric_standards.topic: small infill SCA eligibility - minimum lot size
key_numeric_standards.applies_to: grouped/multiple dwelling infill on R35-or-lower coded lots in areas mapped 'SCA 5.7'

key_numeric_standards.topic: small infill - maximum new dwelling floor area
key_numeric_standards.applies_to: any new dwelling under SCA 5.7 small infill provisions

key_numeric_standards.value: 3 dwellings on lots over 750 m2, plus 1 additional dwelling per 150 m2 in excess of 750 m2
key_numeric_standards.applies_to: SCA 5.7 small infill development (including existing dwellings)

key_numeric_standards.value: 1 bay per new dwelling; max 2 bays for any existing dwelling; nil permitted where one small dwelling is 60 m2 or less

key_numeric_standards.applies_to: SCA 5.7 small infill development (open space as defined by the R-Codes)

key_numeric_standards.topic: small infill - minimum deep planting zone
key_numeric_standards.applies_to: SCA 5.7 small infill development; 50% of the zone on the rear portion of the site

key_numeric_standards.topic: non-residential car parking (example: child care premises)
key_numeric_standards.value: 1 bay per employee plus 1 per 10 children under maximum occupancy

key_numeric_standards.topic: maximum building height (example, Schedule 12 local planning areas)
key_numeric_standards.value: 10 m to Lot 217 Mathieson Avenue; 7 m external wall / 10 m roof ridge for remainder
key_numeric_standards.applies_to: Local Planning Area 3 (North Fremantle), Sub Area 3.3.1 Rocky Bay

cross_references.cited: Planning and Development (Local Planning Schemes) Regulations 2015 (deemed provisions)
Building Code of Australia / National Construction Code
Town Planning Scheme No. 3 (City of Fremantle, superseded)

quality_flags: Front-of-document amendment history table (Amendments 1-88) extracted with interleaved columns - amendment numbers, summaries and gazettal dates run together on shared lines
Tables (zoning Table 2 vehicle parking, schedules) flattened to plain text; pairings of use class to bay rates require careful reading
Body provisions otherwise clean and complete through Schedule A supplementary deemed provisions
